use_cases: Selecting dates and times for appointment scheduling in booking applications
Setting due dates or deadlines in project management tools
Choosing date ranges for filtering data in analytics dashboards
Inputting event dates in calendar applications
Scheduling delivery or pickup times in e-commerce checkout flows
ai_summary: A date-time picker component that allows users to select dates and times through an interactive calendar and time selection interface. Part of the Ruixen.UI component library, it provides a clean, accessible way to handle temporal data entry in forms and scheduling interfaces.
